temporal_description:
(00:00-00:03) A news report is displayed on a wall-mounted LG television. The report, in both Chinese and English, shows a chaotic scene with police officers in white hazmat suits and riot helmets. The English text reads 'POLICE COMMISSIONER DO NOT CROSS'. The camera then pans to reveal a man in a dark suit and glasses speaking seriously into a microphone, with a 'T-F' news logo visible behind him. (Storyline: The scene opens by establishing a serious news event involving a police commissioner, setting a tense and official tone for the narrative.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: Formal, serious. 2) Background sounds or music: A low, tense, and somber musical score begins to play.)
(00:04-00:08) The camera pulls back to reveal a group of people, all dressed in light-colored shirts and dark pants, gathered in a modern office or briefing room. They are all staring intently at the television screen, which is mounted on a dark, textured wall. The room is lit by a single overhead lamp. (Storyline: This segment introduces the main characters, who are all gathered to watch the news report about the commissioner's statement, indicating their professional connection to the event.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: Formal, serious. 2) Background sounds or music: The somber, tense music continues.)
